title: Command Block Crafting
description: A mod and datapack that makes command blocks craftable using redstone and nether stars
body:
# Unlock Ultimate Control with Command Block Crafting!

Ever wished you could harness the power of Command Blocks in your survival world? Command Block Crafting makes that a reality. This mod/datapack introduces a challenging, late-game recipe for the most powerful block in Minecraft, transforming it from a creative-mode exclusive into a coveted end-game prize.

Crafting Recipe:

![cmd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9cfa9fa8022e0e05b1f24c3ea90bcd73d63a9de.png)

Command Block Crafting is for players who want to push the boundaries of their Minecraft world and truly become its master. Are you ready to command your destiny?
